Changed_Network.purpose: Improves performance tracking for specific game places.

Changed_Network.name: DFIntReportClientProcessPacketMetricsStatsHundredths_PlaceFilter

Changed_Network.purpose: Helps improve game performance by identifying and addressing network issues.
